spec.title: Rate Limit Breaches (rate/1m)
spec.description: Breaches per second, not cumulative total

spec.title: Redis Ops/sec & Connections
spec.description: Redis command throughput and connected clients

spec.title: Redis Command / Queue Latency (p99)
spec.description: Redis command latency / queue latency for Lua script calls (requires latency histograms enabled on the exporter)

spec.title: API Request Rate
spec.description: Requests per second by route and status code

spec.title: API Response Latency (p50/p99)
spec.description: p50/p99 API response latency (requires histogram buckets enabled for http.server.requests)
